name: Grilled Lemon Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tsp Reduced Sodium Lemon Pepper Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Deeply score the cut sides of potatoes using a sharp knife.
2. Cover skinside with foil.
3. Combine remaining ingredients; brush cut sides with margarine mixture.
4. Grill potatoes, cut side up, 5 to 6 inches from medium coals for 40 minutes, basting every 10 minutes.
5. Turn potatoes and grill another 10 minutes.
6. Turn potatoes again and baste with remaining margarine mixture.
7. Grill an additional 10 minutes (Fat 7.4, Chol. 0.)
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
